case_title: JOBSCIENCE,INC. VS. DON RAMER et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER JOBSCIENCE,INC. AS TO RESPONDENT RAMER, DON RECRUITUSA, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, APPEARANCE FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY. COUNSEL APPEARED AND PROVIDED A PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT STRIKES THE TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTS PETITIONER JOBSCIENCE, INC'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF ARBITRATOR'S AWARD. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF ARBITRATOR'S AWARD, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER JOBSCIENCE,INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-09-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOBSCIENCE,INC. SERVED JUN-06-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RECRUITUSA, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOBSCIENCE,INC. SERVED JUN-06-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RECRUITUSA, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOBSCIENCE,INC. SERVED JUN-06-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RAMER, DON
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER JOBSCIENCE,INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT RECRUITUSA, INC. $80,646.22 PRINCIPAL, $10,850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $9,736.33 INTEREST, $3,600.00 ARBITRATION FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $104,832.55, (ALSO POST ARBITRATION FEES IN THE SUM OF $3,848.64 IS AWARDED TO PETITIONER) SEE SCANNED DOC FOR COMPLETE DETAILS)
